title: Career Matching Services
text:
Career Matching Services - SupportGoWhere
Career Matching Services
Share link
Provide career advisory and guidance to support in your job search and career transition.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Career advisory services to assess job readiness and explore career options
Job-matching services to access job opportunities
Ascertain values, interest, personality, skills and job fit
Collapse all sections
About this support

Career advisory and guidance to help you plan for your career and navigate job search challenges through WSG and NTUC's e2i career centres, Jobs and Skills Centres, as well as our Career Matching Providers (Ingeus and AngusKnight Singapore) 

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens, Permanent Residents and foreign spouses who are Long-Term Visit Pass/Long-Term Visit Pass Plus Holders with Pre-Approved Letter of Consent or Letter of Consent 

How to apply?

Book an appointment or connect with us over a video call. 

Where can I find help?

View more details

Scheme last updated 23 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
